args.cypher:
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(asset:Asset)
WHERE aas.idShort = 'MiR100' OR asset.globalAssetId CONTAINS 'MiR100' OR asset.globalAssetId CONTAINS 'mir100'
RETURN aas.idShort, aas.id, asset.globalAssetId, asset.assetKind

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {id: $aasId})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN sm.idShort, sm.id, sc.id AS templateSemanticId

MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: $submodelId})-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el:SubmodelElement)
WHERE el.modelType = 'Property' OR el.modelType = 'MultiLanguageProperty'
RETURN el.idShort, el.modelType, 
       CASE WHEN el.modelType = 'Property' THEN el.value ELSE NULL END AS value,
       CASE WHEN el.modelType = 'Property' THEN el.valueType ELSE NULL END AS valueType
LIMIT 50

MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: $submodelId})-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el:SubmodelElement)
RETURN el.idShort, el.modelType, el.smId
LIMIT 100

MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: $submodelId})-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el:SubmodelElement)
WHERE el.idShort IN ['SpeedMaxWithMaxLoadAsSpecified', 'SpeedMaxEmptyAsSpecified']
WITH el
MATCH (el)-[:HAS_VALUE]->(val)
RETURN el.idShort, val.language, val.text AS value

MATCH (parent:SubmodelElement {idShort: 'TechnicalParameters'})-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el:SubmodelElement)
RETURN el.idShort, el.modelType
LIMIT 50
